title: boehmeria longispica var. tricuspis
intro: Boehmeria longispica var. tricuspis, also known as Boehmeria longispica, is a plant species belonging to the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria longispica var. tricuspis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from malaria and other diseases. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
